how.heading: How planning with AsiaTravelPlan works
how.card1.title: 1. Free discovery call
how.card1.body: We align on destination mix, travel pace, comfort level, and budget.
how.card2.title: 2. Route options in 48-72h
how.card2.body: You receive two practical concepts with transparent inclusions.
how.card3.title: 3. Refine and confirm
how.card3.body: We tune hotels, activities, and transport until the plan fits you.
how.card4.title: 4. Travel with support
how.card4.body: Our local team helps before and during your trip, including rerouting if needed.
why.heading: Why travelers choose AsiaTravelPlan
why.item1: Structured customization: hotels, transport, guiding, and pace can be tuned clearly.
why.item2: Honest pricing logic: what changes your quote is explained before payment.
why.item3: Local execution: practical rerouting support if weather or operations shift.
why.item4: Comfort-first routing for travelers who value quality over bargain stress.
why.caption: Local experts in Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, and Laos.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is $500 per week enough for a comfortable trip?
faq.a1: Usually yes for smart-comfort planning, depending on season, route complexity, and hotel tier.
faq.q2: Private or group travel: what is better?
faq.a2: Private travel works best for flexibility and comfort. Group tours can reduce cost but with less control.
faq.q3: How quickly do you send itinerary options?
faq.a3: Our standard is 48 to 72 hours after your discovery call.
faq.q4: Can we combine all four countries in one route?
faq.a4: Yes. We can design multi-country routes with realistic pacing and clear transfer planning.
faq.q5: What if weather disrupts our plan?
faq.a5: We provide practical alternatives and rerouting support using our local partner network.
faq.q6: Do you support visa and entry guidance?
faq.a6: Yes. We provide up-to-date guidance for entry requirements and practical prep checklists.
contact.heading: Book your free discovery call
contact.body: Tell us your destination ideas and budget. We will reply with clear options and next steps.
contact.item1: Local experts across Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, and Laos.
contact.item2: Clear inclusions and exclusions before booking.
contact.item3: Fast first proposal in 48 to 72 hours.
contact.item4: On-trip support if plans need to change.
contact.response_time: Response within 24 hours on email or WhatsApp.
